theme: kingdom treasury sets guild tax brackets
title: Guild Ledger: Setting the Kingdom's Tax Brackets
strategies: trivial: emit the mild flat reference tax (reproduces the checker baseline, ~0.1)
greedy: textbook monotone-progressive schedule at income percentiles, floor-repaired by shaving the top rate -- ignores elasticity and over-taxes the elastic middle band

strong: coordinate-ascent the bracket rates against the true population best-response subject to the welfare floor, letting each bracket settle near its own Laffer point -> a NON-MONOTONE schedule that cuts the rate exactly on the elastic middle mass and taxes the inelastic bands hard
open ceiling: joint threshold+rate search / per-mass bracket placement can beat the local coordinate-ascent reference
